author: quorafind
description: Edit daily notes in one page (inline), which works similar to Roam Research's default daily note view.

manifest.author: Boninall
manifest.description: Edit a bunch of daily notes in one page(inline), which works similar to Roam Research's default daily note view.
manifest.name: Daily Notes Editor

releases.author: Quorafind
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Fix viewport width overflows on small screens by @Foxy-null in https://github.com/Quorafind/Obsidian-Daily-Notes-Editor/pull/52
* 1.0 by @Quorafind in https://github.com/Quorafind/Obsidian-Daily-Notes-Editor/pull/55
   - [feat: support time range](https://github.com/Quorafind/Obsidian-Daily-Notes-Editor/pull/55/commits/ceff6012ff2e1bd38cdbfbad51f523eb2f2bf5b3)
   - [feat: support create daily note automatically](https://github.com/Quorafind/Obsidian-Daily-Notes-Editor/pull/55/commits/89073a5306fd4f1d5c048155270d3577245aaa50)
   - [feat: support tag or folder flow editor](https://github.com/Quorafind/Obsidian-Daily-Notes-Editor/pull/55/commits/2eb78f227c19bc0a1b3d449fa720d7d1b9e3e2ee)
   - [feat: support sort and reverse sort all files](https://github.com/Quorafind/Obsidian-Daily-Notes-Editor/pull/55/commits/ba6831adb67d71a471198b7f6d9b4cec41a6d1bf)
   - [feat: support arrowup and arrowdown to navigate between different dai…](https://github.com/Quorafind/Obsidian-Daily-Notes-Editor/pull/55/commits/32596ceb3bcffcccfd7c38c27227b5fe2352449a)
   - [feat: update indicator](https://github.com/Quorafind/Obsidian-Daily-Notes-Editor/pull/55/commits/2ddb4adac9c2ea92d7ebab7f0899fe94c773fe14)
   - [style: update basic styles of daily note editor](https://github.com/Quorafind/Obsidian-Daily-Notes-Editor/pull/55/commits/6915aa5ffccfad4d19d79299dee0d1d448bf472b)
   - [fix: cannot focus on editor](https://github.com/Quorafind/Obsidian-Daily-Notes-Editor/pull/55/commits/deb5dbdbbcedf48ec6affa45c6f48966779bda08)
   - [feat: support save state after configure](https://github.com/Quorafind/Obsidian-Daily-Notes-Editor/pull/55/commits/d5082fc6f1398703fa68942a70e562585d8aee97)
   - [fix: cannot trigger command in editor](https://github.com/Quorafind/Obsidian-Daily-Notes-Editor/pull/55/commits/7812f6248ddc9ce23671fb68e6aacaab649f32fc)
   - [feat: update style](https://github.com/Quorafind/Obsidian-Daily-Notes-Editor/pull/55/commits/1e02754f757b5725be8d00394e5286b644b3d1f3)
   - [fix: load incorrectly files into view](https://github.com/Quorafind/Obsidian-Daily-Notes-Editor/pull/55/commits/1b753449506c5de3065abb4dfe4675564d6ea25e)
   - [chore: remove unused files](https://github.com/Quorafind/Obsidian-Daily-Notes-Editor/pull/55/commits/b4677398f59a395e266f0eeac6029926cea143c9)
   - [fix: should not prevent open file in file explorer](https://github.com/Quorafind/Obsidian-Daily-Notes-Editor/pull/55/commits/0b1553531e3299dfdd0e73d70c2bb4992db79c33)
   - [fix: cannot input with template](https://github.com/Quorafind/Obsidian-Daily-Notes-Editor/pull/55/commits/35dca7f2468ccfad044791b5b94c195c6392bcea)
   - [chore: update calendar](https://github.com/Quorafind/Obsidian-Daily-Notes-Editor/pull/55/commits/d1cad8b577148ccefe5e731bdb41b09e968f1d78)
   - [style: update list style](https://github.com/Quorafind/Obsidian-Daily-Notes-Editor/pull/55/commits/bc0b2695892018a0f52f77236358af416c7468ed)
   - [feat: support more intelligent lazy load method](https://github.com/Quorafind/Obsidian-Daily-Notes-Editor/pull/55/commits/33c1030e47ea93829efb8ec03fac8a0b7ce62bf8)
   - [feat: support collapse editor](https://github.com/Quorafind/Obsidian-Daily-Notes-Editor/pull/55/commits/f0074985f8950c669702e0f283be5dd478ba490d)
   - [style: update editor style](https://github.com/Quorafind/Obsidian-Daily-Notes-Editor/pull/55/commits/32b38f0aca1cb70de08116c48a8a1eafffb12bd9)

## New Contributors
* @Foxy-null made their first contribution in https://github.com/Quorafind/Obsidian-Daily-Notes-Editor/pull/52

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Quorafind/Obsidian-Daily-Notes-Editor/compare/0.1.8...1.0.0
